name: Luxe Window Works
description: Custom window treatment specialist serving Northern Idaho. Custom blinds, shades, shutters, and motorized window coverings with lifetime installation guarantee.

contact.name: Mark Abplanalp
contact.title: Owner & Window Treatment Specialist
contact.address: 2972 N Pavo Ln, Post Falls, ID 83854

capabilities.name: Free In-Home Consultation
capabilities.description: No-pressure in-home consultation and measurement for custom window treatments. We listen to your needs and recommend the right solution for your budget.

capabilities.name: Custom Blinds & Shades
capabilities.description: Custom-fitted cellular, roller, solar, roman, and banded shades for any window size or shape including arches, skylights, and specialty angles.

capabilities.name: Motorization & Smart Home Integration
capabilities.description: Professional motorized shade installation with Bond Bridge Pro and smart home scene automation. Solves RF signal issues in large homes.

capabilities.name: Plantation Shutters
capabilities.description: Premium custom plantation shutters for light control, privacy, and home value.

capabilities.name: Energy Efficiency Consultation
capabilities.description: Cellular honeycomb shades that reduce energy costs up to 20% with R-values up to 7.86. Expert advice on energy-efficient window treatments for Northern Idaho climate.

primary_cta.label: Book a Free Consultation
primary_cta.description: Free in-home consultation and measurement — no pressure, no obligation
